message:
🌱 Fix permission patterns for gh commands with unset prefix

The pattern needs to match the full prefix including && to work
with commands like `unset GITHUB_TOKEN && gh api ...`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,8 @@
       "Bash(head:*)",
       "Bash(tail:*)",
       "Bash(wc:*)",
-      "Bash(unset GITHUB_TOKEN:*)",
+      "Bash(unset GITHUB_TOKEN && gh:*)",
+      "Bash(unset GITHUB_TOKEN && for:*)",
       "Bash(go build:*)",
       "Bash(go test:*)",
       "Bash(go mod:*)",
